Pythia Cookbooks provide example workflows on more advanced and domain-specific problems developed by the Pythia community. Click each card below to see its cookbook.
Cookbooks build on top of skills you learn in
This Cookbook is a comprehensive showcase of workflows & techniques for visualizing Unstructured Grids using UXarray
This Cookbook demonstrates advanced plotting routines using the Python packages matplotlib, cartopy, metpy, and geocat-viz.
A complete workflow for a convolutional neural network using xbatcher.
This Project Pythia Cookbook provides a recipe for building an interactive dashboard for the Sentinel-2 L2A satellite imagery using the holo…
A cookbook to learn to work with wavelets in Python
The Visualization and Analysis Platform for Ocean, Atmosphere, and Solar Researchers (VAPOR) provides an interactive 3D visualization enviro…
This cookbook shows examples of using and creating Intake catalogs to access data.
Examples of analysis of Google Cloud CMIP6 data using Pangeo tools.
A cookbook for working with AWS-served HRRR model output data.
This cookbook covers paleoclimate model-data comparison using spatio-temporal pattern obtained using Principal Component Analysis (PCA).
Earth Observation Data Science Cookbook provides training material centered around Earth Observation data while honoring the Pangeo Philosop…
Kerchunk provides cloud-friendly access to archival data. With Kerchunk you can read collections of legacy file formats (NetCDF, GRIB2 etc.)…
This Project Pythia Cookbook covers using the Open Science Data Federation (OSDF), a service for streaming scientific data across the globe.
A small collection of notebooks that explores some (re)gridding options within the Xarray ecosystem. The thumbnail image was created with th…

An introduction to HEALPix and utilization of easy.gems and UXarray to run data analysis and visualization functionality on HEALPix data set…
Description of empirical orthogonal function (EOF) analysis and examples of its application to climate data.
A notebook for visualizing data from the NA-CORDEX dataset.
This Project Pythia Cookbook covers working with various sources of ocean biogeochemistry data, including Community Earth System Model (CESM…
A cookbook for working with data from the Earth System Grid Federation.
A cookbook to interactively explore and visualize ERA-5 data in ARCO format.
Notebooks developed to demonstrate analysis of CESM LENS data publicly available on Amazon S3 (us-west-2 region) using Xarray and Dask.
A cookbook meant to work with various weather radar data.
Tutorials for working with NASA SnowEx mission datasets.

executed in the cloud with a single click from your browser
